coin_profile.name: Ethereum
coin_profile.description: Ethereum is the leading smart contract platform and the foundation of decentralised finance (DeFi). It transitioned to proof-of-stake in 2022 (The Merge), making it energy-efficient. ETH is used to pay for computation on the network and is deflationary post-EIP-1559, with a portion of fees burned with every transaction. It underpins the majority of DeFi, NFT, and Layer 2 ecosystems.

ETH.name: Ethereum

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Price above speculative fair value — no margin of safety.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 8.8/10 and survivability 93.3%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

ETH.iv_method: Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: Protocol generates $2.41B in annual fees — demonstrating real, sustained user demand
Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles
Strong quality score of 8.8/10 (Safe) across all key metrics
bear_points: DCF model suggests Ethereum is trading at a 1773.2% premium to fair value (est. $115.44)
High MC/Fees ratio of 108.46x means investors are paying a large premium relative to actual protocol fee generation
FDV/Holders Revenue of 12807.24x — very little fee revenue currently reaches token holders, limiting investment returns

coin_profile.name: Ethereum Classic
coin_profile.description: Ethereum Classic is the original Ethereum chain that continued after the 2016 DAO hack fork. It maintains the original 'code is law' philosophy and is proof-of-work. ETC has a fixed supply schedule and positions itself as a store of value for the Ethereum ecosystem.

ETC.name: Ethereum Classic

forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket B (Store of Value): Valued on scarcity and monetary premium. Monetary Premium measures share of gold market cap captured. Production Cost Floor provides a PoW mining-cost floor (×2 premium). Supply Adjusted Value penalises tokens with significant unlocked supply. Network Activity (NVT) treats volume as monetary circulation velocity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

ETC.iv_method: Monetary Premium, Supply Adjusted Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: At 0.01% of gold's market cap, substantial upside remains if monetary adoption continues to grow
Full gold parity would imply a price of $134,583 — 1553976% above current price
Over 74% of maximum supply already in circulation — minimal future dilution risk
bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
Regulatory uncertainty across major markets presents an ongoing risk
Competition from newer protocols could erode Ethereum Classic's market position over time

coin_profile.name: Ethena
coin_profile.description: Ethena is an RWA-backed synthetic dollar protocol. USDe is Ethena's stablecoin, backed by a delta-neutral strategy using staked ETH and short perpetual positions. The protocol distributes yield from this strategy to sUSDe holders and ENA stakers.

ENA.name: Ethena

Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Limited price history available (2 year(s)). This token may be recently listed or have insufficient on-chain data.

bull_points: Escoin maintains a top-431 market cap position with established liquidity
Long-term adoption thesis remains intact for Cash-Flow Protocol assets
Broader crypto market development continues to benefit established protocols
bear_points: No historical fee data available on DeFiLlama — protocol may be too new or too small to have an established economic track record
